 title: Add tests for get_callgraph location resolution and defaults
 ---
 ops/get_callgraph.rs

Coverage: 83.0% (73/88 lines)

Uncovered lines: 42, 44, 193, 195, 197, 199, 202, 210, 212-214, 218-221

Two areas:
1. `CallGraphOptions::default()` (lines 42, 44) - Default trait impl
2. `try_resolve_by_location` (lines 193-221) - parses file:line:char string, queries lsp_symbols by position

Test scenarios:
- CallGraphOptions::default() → verify default fields
- get_callgraph with "file:line:char" symbol string where symbol exists → verify correct root
- "file:line:char" where no symbol at those coordinates → Ok(None), fallback to name-match
- Invalid file:line:char (non-numeric) → Ok(None)
- fetch_edges with CallGraphDirection::Both → both inbound and outbound edges

#coverage-gap #coverage-gap
\ No newline at end of file
